value.found_quote: Skills are an open standard for extending agent capabilities. A skill is a folder containing a `SKILL.md` file with instructions that the agent can follow when working on specific tasks.
value.rationale: The page directly substantiates all key elements of the claim: (1) Google's Antigravity product offers "Agent Skills"; (2) it is described as an "open standard for extending agent capabilities"; and (3) skills are reusable packages stored in structured folders (e.g., `.agents/skills/<skill-folder>/`) containing a `SKILL.md` file. The page presents the feature as currently available (no preview/beta language), placing its lifecycle status as active.
